name: raycast-android
title: Android Link
description: Clipboard sync and file transfer between your Mac and Android phone
author: ddagar

preferences.name: downloadDirectory
preferences.title: Download Directory
preferences.description: Where to save files received from your phone

preferences.name: autoSync
preferences.title: Auto Sync Clipboard
preferences.description: Automatically sync clipboard between devices in the background
preferences.label: Enable automatic clipboard sync

preferences.name: showNotifications
preferences.title: Show Notifications
preferences.description: Show HUD notifications when clipboard is synced
preferences.label: Show sync notifications

commands.name: devices
commands.title: Devices
commands.subtitle: Android Link
commands.description: View and manage connected Android devices

commands.name: send-clipboard
commands.title: Send Clipboard to Phone
commands.subtitle: Android Link
commands.description: Send your Mac clipboard content to your Android phone

commands.name: pull-clipboard
commands.title: Pull Clipboard from Phone
commands.subtitle: Android Link
commands.description: Get clipboard content from your Android phone

commands.name: send-file
commands.title: Send File to Phone
commands.subtitle: Android Link
commands.description: Send a file to your Android phone

commands.name: clipboard-history
commands.title: Clipboard History
commands.subtitle: Android Link
commands.description: View synced clipboard history between devices

commands.name: status
commands.title: Android Link Status
commands.subtitle: Android Link
commands.description: Menu bar status for Android Link
